content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: spoof(x-user-id) ∧ authz_bypass ⇒ data_tamper
P: hdr_override → sess_only → drop_hdr
V: keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied
R: ! hdr_override ∧ ! data_tamper
A: drop_hdr(x-user-id)

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: spoof(x-user-id) and authorization bypass implies data_tamper.
Plan: header override then verified session auth only then drop the header path.
Verify: keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Risk: high-risk header override and high-risk data_tamper.
Answer target: drop the header path(x-user-id).
